hero.title: Smart customer service for your company

features.omnichannelDesc: WhatsApp, WABA, SMS and webchat in one place.
features.campaignsDesc: Send mass segmented campaigns with detailed reports.

plans.title: Plans and pricing
plans.subtitle: Choose the ideal plan — no surprises.
plans.loadError: Could not load plans right now. Please try again in a moment.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Do I need a credit card to try?
faq.a1: No. Plans with a trial period give immediate access without a card.
faq.q2: Can I change my plan later?
faq.a2: Yes, upgrades can be done at any time and the value is adjusted on your invoice.
faq.a3: Yes. Dedicated infrastructure, backups and encryption in transit.
